props.name: chipClassName
props.description: Adds custom classes to chips rendered by the component. Accepts a static className or a resolver function based on chip value.

props.name: createOnBlur
props.description: Creates a new chip when the component loses focus with a pending value.

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: Sets the initial uncontrolled values rendered by the component.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Toggle the disabled state for the component.

props.name: filter
props.description: Renders the chips as filter chips, each showing a leading check icon while selected. Implies `selectable`.

props.name: id
props.description: Sets the `id` of the internal text input rendered by the component.

props.name: label
props.description: Renders an inline label inside the component container.

props.name: maxChips
props.description: Sets the maximum number of chips that can be created in the component.

props.name: modelValue
props.description: The default name for a value passed using v-model.

props.name: name
props.description: Sets the name of the hidden input used by the component for form submission.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Sets placeholder text for the internal input of the component.

props.name: readOnly
props.description: Toggle the readonly state for the component.

props.name: removable
props.description: Displays remove buttons on chips managed by the component.

props.name: selectable
props.description: Enables chip selection behavior in the component.

props.name: selectionMode
props.description: Sets how many chips can be selected at once.

props.name: separator
props.description: Sets the separator character used to create chips while typing or pasting in the component.

props.name: size
props.description: Size the component small or large.

events.name: add
events.description: Event occurs when the component adds a new chip.

events.name: change
events.description: Event occurs when the value list changes.

events.name: input
events.description: Event occurs when the internal text input value changes.

events.name: remove
events.description: Event occurs when the component removes a chip.

events.name: select
events.description: Event occurs when the selected chip values change.

events.name: update:modelValue
events.description: Emit the new value whenever there's a change.
